message.content: {"analysis":"The old autotune process keeps running despite kill attempts. Commands are being concatenated with the process output. I need to forcefully kill all Python processes and wait for clean state.","plan":"Send SIGKILL to all Python processes forcefully, wait, then verify clean state.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"killall -9 python3; sleep 2\n","duration":5.0},{"keystrokes":"ps aux | grep python\n","duration":1.0}]}
